is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study explicitly investigates Plasmodium falciparum drug-resistance genes in Asar village, eastern Sudan.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports pfcrt-76T, pfmdr1-86Y, dhfr-108N, dhps-437G, dhps-540E — all curated target codons (Pfcrt 76, Pfmdr1 86, Pfdhfr 108, Pfdhps 437,540).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Allele frequencies given per year in Figure 1 with sample sizes (44,50,50,33,48,38,48 isolates), Table 3 gives changes in allele frequencies per season.

sub_country_location.evidence: All samples are from Asar village, Gedaref state, eastern Sudan — a single named sub-national site (town level).

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected in distinct wet seasons (Oct/Nov) of 1990, 1993, 1998, 1999, 2001 and dry seasons (Jun/Jul) 1999, 2000, with frequencies reported per single season/year (Figure 1).

african_field_samples.evidence: Finger-prick blood samples from patients attending clinic in Asar village, eastern Sudan (African field/clinical isolates).

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary longitudinal field study using PCR analysis of isolates collected over 12 years.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Authors state 'The significant fluctuation of drug-resistance genes in Asar village confirms our observations in other neighboring villages' and cite prior collections [11], and clones 'originally obtained from the village' [28]; single-village longitudinal series related to prior published work by same group.

supplement.evidence: Per-year frequencies are plotted in Figure 1 and sample sizes given in text; no external supplement pointer for extractable data.

assessment.summary: Longitudinal field study in Asar village, Gedaref state, eastern Sudan (1990-2001) monitoring P. falciparum drug-resistance allele frequencies at pfcrt-76, pfmdr1-86, dhfr-108, dhps-437 and dhps-540 across distinct wet and dry seasons. Sub-village resolution and single-season/year temporal binning; per-year allele frequencies plotted in Figure 1 with sample sizes reported. All criteria met. Exact numerator values must be read off Figure 1.
